testpoints.name: dispatch_exec_instruction
testpoints.description: Dispatch an ALU/exec instruction: exec_opcode_valid=1, generic bus populated.

testpoints.name: dispatch_lsu_instruction
testpoints.description: Dispatch an LSU load/store instruction: lsu_opcode_valid=1, LSU bus populated.

testpoints.name: dispatch_csr_instruction
testpoints.description: Dispatch a CSR instruction: csr_opcode_valid=1, CSR bus populated.

testpoints.name: dispatch_mul_instruction
testpoints.description: Dispatch a multiply instruction: mul_opcode_valid=1, MUL bus populated, mul_in_flight set.

testpoints.name: dispatch_div_instruction
testpoints.description: Dispatch a divide instruction: div_opcode_valid=1, div_in_flight set.

testpoints.name: exec_hold_stall
testpoints.description: Exec hold asserted (exec_in_flight): fetch_accept=0, no new dispatch.

testpoints.name: lsu_stall_backpressure
testpoints.description: LSU stall asserted: fetch_accept=0, pipeline stalled.

testpoints.name: interrupt_taken
testpoints.description: Interrupt taken: fetch_accept=0, interrupt_inhibit set.

testpoints.name: branch_exec_forwarding
testpoints.description: Branch result from exec unit forwarded to Fetch: branch_request=1, PC/priv set.

testpoints.name: branch_csr_forwarding
testpoints.description: Branch result from CSR unit forwarded to Fetch: CSR branch takes priority after exec.

testpoints.name: writeback_exec_merge
testpoints.description: Exec unit writeback merged to regfile (highest priority).

testpoints.name: writeback_mem_merge
testpoints.description: Memory writeback merged to regfile (second priority after exec).

testpoints.name: writeback_mul_merge
testpoints.description: Multiply writeback merged to regfile (third priority).

testpoints.name: writeback_div_with_valid
testpoints.description: Divide writeback with valid signal merged to regfile (lowest priority).

testpoints.name: bypass_from_exec
testpoints.description: Data bypass from exec writeback: rs1/rs2 match exec_rd_idx, forwarded value used.

testpoints.name: bypass_from_mem
testpoints.description: Data bypass from memory writeback: rs1/rs2 match mem_rd_idx_reg.

testpoints.name: bypass_from_mul
testpoints.description: Data bypass from multiply writeback: rs1/rs2 match mul_rd_idx_reg.

testpoints.name: fetch_fault_handling
testpoints.description: Fetch fault (fetch_fault_fetch/page): regfile not read, opcode_invalid set.

testpoints.name: csr_writeback_output
testpoints.description: CSR E1 result output: csr_writeback_write=1, exception/wdata forwarded.

testpoints.name: mul_hold_stall
testpoints.description: Mul hold asserted (mul_in_flight): only blocks new dispatch, does not stall other units.

testpoints.name: interrupt_inhibit_cleared
testpoints.description: After interrupt, when no valid instruction and no branch, interrupt_inhibit clears.

testpoints.name: no_dispatch_regfile_process
testpoints.description: When no valid instruction, regfile still gets process() called for writeback completion.
